title: Lebanese Chicken Shawarma with Tabbouleh
description: A flavorful and refreshing Middle Eastern dish featuring marinated chicken, crispy pita, and crunchy tabbouleh salad.

ingredients.name: zaatar
ingredients.notes: mixed with olive oil and lemon juice

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together zaatar, lemon juice, garlic, and olive oil to make the marinade.
2. Add the chicken strips to the marinade and mix well to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
3. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat. Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
4. Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for a few minutes.
5. Assemble the shawarma by spreading a layer of tabbouleh on each pita, followed by a few strips of grilled chicken.
6. Brush the pita with olive oil and sprinkle with salt to taste.
